      Conferences

      On this page

      • 2020

      2020

      Solvay Workshop “The asymptotic structure of spacetime”, Brussels (Nov. 23 - 24, Online)

      YITP Workshop Strings and Fields 2020, Kyoto, Japan (Nov. 16 - 20, Online)

      TTbar Deformation and Integrability, APCTP, Pohang, Korea (Nov. 8 - 14, Online)

      KIAS Autumn Symposium on String Theory, KIAS, Seoul, Korea (Sep. 21 - 25)

      Quantum Matter and Quantum Information with Holography, APCTP, Pohang, Korea (Aug. 23 - 31, Online)

      Strings, Branes and Gauge Theories, APCTP, Pohang, Korea (Jul. 15 - 21, Online)

      New Frontiers in String and Field Theories, Grand Hyatt Incheon, Korea (Jan. 27 - 28)
